00691|   const monitorSwapStatus = async (requestId: string) => {
00692|     const maxAttempts = 60
00693|     let attempts = 0
00694|     let lastStatus = ''
00695| 
00696|     const checkStatus = async () => {

00699|

00701|           status: status.status,
00702|           details: status.details,
00703|           inTxHashes: status.inTxHashes,
00704|           txHashes: status.txHashes,
00705|         })
00706| 
00707|         // Show status updates to user
00708|         if (status.status !== lastStatus) {
00709|           lastStatus = status.status
00710|           
00711|           if (status.status === 'waiting') {
00712|             toast.info('Waiting for transaction confirmation...')
00713|           } else if (status.status === 'pending') {
00714|             toast.info('Processing swap...')
00715|           } else if (status.status === 'submitted') {
00716|             toast.info('Swap submitted to destination chain...')
00717|           } else if (status.status === 'delayed') {
00718|             toast.warning('Swap is taking longer than expected...')
00719|           }
00720|         }
00721|         
00722|         if (status.status === 'success') {

00734|           setIsSwapping(false)
